PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jan-09-2023 Continued To Mar-01-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and her Counsel to appear on March 1, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution has not been filed. Today's status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Choi. Matter not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-21-2022 Continued To Jan-09-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Oct-31-2022 Continued To Nov-21-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing An Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jun-15-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-15-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-04-2022 Continued To Jun-15-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Marilyn Young, via Zoom, for Mercedes Williams, Personal Representative.

Counsel reports that she has a signed petition that is ready to file but and has not yet filed an inventory and appraisal as the estate's real property has just recently been listed for sale. Counsel advises that she intends to file the inventory and appraisal by this Friday and the Petition shortly thereafter.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Jun-15-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. A Status on the Filing of an Inventory and Appraisal is set for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Andam. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-23-2022 Continued To May-04-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Marilyn Kreger, via zoom, for Mercedes T.R. Williams, Executor.

Counsel reports that she has an Inventory and Appraisal ready to file. Counsel also reports that the real property is being prepared to list for sale and hopes that it will sell by next month. Counsel advises that she plans to file a Petition for Approval of Status Report and asks for a continuance of one (1) month.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to May-04-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Counsel is instructed to file her documents by Apr-22-2022.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: G. Bastain. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-02-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. The Court noted that notice is sufficient and that there are no objections. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated March 19, 2015 is admitted to probate. Mercedes Williams is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for March 23, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
